sglang.bodyExcerpt: There is a wrong line in schedule_batch.py that will trigger cpu-gpu copy. It introduces unnecessary overhead in bench_latency.py. This wrong line is only used in bench_latency.py

In the latest transformers (4.45.0.dev0) the config.vocab_size accessor and  _vocab_size field in the config were removed from a few models.
huggingface/transformers#33446
Running examples/offline_inference_vision_language.py results in an error
AttributeError: 'PaliGemmaConfig' object has no attrib

vllm.title: [CI/Build] use setuptools-scm to set __version__
vllm.author: dtrifiro
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
By using setuptools-scm, we can get versioning information directly from git.
This PR includes changes to Dockerfiles in order correctly build including setuptools-scm.
Example of version string for a dev build: 0.5.0.post2.dev75+gbabbef7d (75 commits after last tag, commit sha: babbef7d)
Note that

vllm.title: [Kernel] (2/N) Machete - Integrate into CompressedTensorsWNA16 and GPTQMarlin
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add Machete kernels as a backend kernel for GPTQMarlinLinearMethod and CompressedTensorsWNA16. As part of adding support  GPTQMarlinLinearMethod support for dynamic group ids (g_idx, i.e. colloquially known and actorder) was added by permuting the columns of the activation tensor before calling mach

vllm.title: [Kernel][LoRA]  Add assertion for punica sgmv kernels
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add an assertion for the input token numbers of the Punica SGMV kernel to avoid incorrect kernel calculation results. This is particularly useful for supporting LoRA in Vision-Language models.
Fix some typo errors

ping @Yard1

vllm.title: [Core] Allow IPv6 in VLLM_HOST_IP with zmq
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt: To use IPv6 on a zmq socket, you must explicitly specify the IPv6 socket option. For the remote socket case, check to see if the IP includes a ':' and if so, turn on IPv6 mode.

vllm.author: jiqing-feng
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix typical acceptance sampler with correct recovered token ids

vllm.title: Add output streaming support to multi-step + async while ensuring RequestOutput obj reuse
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds output streaming support to multi-step + async. Current implementation is based on MQLLMEngine. vllm.title: [MISC] Skip dumping inputs when unpicklable
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #8738
Some model inputs such as FlashInfer kernel wrapper cannot be pickled. While we should have a better way to dump these inputs for reproducible, this quick PR simply does not pickle model inputs in this case to make sure the real error can be exposed in the first place.
cc @robertgshaw2-neu
